calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Court signs Decree changing name to Kyriell Muhammad Noon.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing. There being no appearance by the moving party the court orders the matter off calendar.
